panels.description: CPU usage of the monitored object
panels.title: CPU Usage

panels.description: Memory usage of the monitored object
panels.title: Memory Usage

panels.description: Average number of I/O requests processed by the system in a specified period
panels.title: IOPS

panels.description: Incoming traffic in bytes per second
panels.title: Network Input Throughput

panels.description: Outgoing traffic in bytes per second
panels.title: Network Output Throughput

panels.description: Storage space usage of the monitored object
panels.title: Storage Space Usage

panels.description: Total storage space of the monitored object
panels.title: Total Storage Space

panels.description: Used storage space of the monitored object
panels.title: Used Storage Space

panels.description: Number of bytes read from the disk per second
panels.title: Disk Read Throughput

panels.description: Number of bytes written into the disk per second
panels.title: Disk Write Throughput

panels.description: Number of processes to be written into the monitored object
panels.title: Average Disk Queue Length

panels.description: Number of database connections in use
panels.title: Database Connections in Use

panels.description: Number of lazy writes per second
panels.title: Lazy Writes per Second

panels.description: Total number of processes waiting for a workspace memory grant
panels.title: Memory Grants Pending

panels.description: Number of seconds a page will stay in the buffer pool without references
panels.title: Page Life Expectancy

panels.description: Number of page reads per second
panels.title: Page Reads per Second

panels.description: Disk space occupied by the current temporary tablespace.
panels.title: Temporary Tablespace Size

panels.description: Number of transactions started for the database per second
panels.title: Transactions per Second

panels.description: Number of Transact-SQL command batches received per second
panels.title: Batches per Second

panels.description: Total number of logins started per second
panels.title: Logins per Second

panels.description: Total number of logouts started per second
panels.title: Logouts per Second

panels.description: Ratio of pages found in the buffer cache without having to read from the disk to total pages
panels.title: Cache Hit Ratio

panels.description: Number of SQL compilations per second
panels.title: SQL Compilations per Second

panels.description: Number of SQL recompilations per second
panels.title: SQL Recompilations per Second

panels.description: Number of unrestricted full scans per second
panels.title: Full Scans per Second

panels.description: Number of errors per second
panels.title: Errors per Second

panels.description: Number of latch requests that have not been granted immediately
panels.title: Latch Waits per Second

panels.description: Number of lock wait requests per second
panels.title: Lock Waits per Second

panels.description: Number of new locks and lock conversions per second requested from the lock manager
panels.title: Lock Requests per Second

panels.description: Number of lock timeouts per second
panels.title: Lock Timeouts per Second

panels.description: Average wait time (ms) of lock requests
panels.title: Average Lock Wait Time

panels.description: Number of deadlocks per second
panels.title: Deadlocks per Second

panels.description: Number of pages flushed to the disk per second by a checkpoint or other operations that require all dirty pages to be flushed
panels.title: Checkpoint Pages per Second

panels.description: Delay for replication between primary and standby DB instances. The replication delay of RDS for SQL Server DB instances is at the database level because data is synchronized on each database. The instance-level replication delay refers to the maximum replication delay of the databases (the delay 0s for single DB instances).
panels.title: Replication Delay
